message:
docs(quic): add QUIC/H3 interoperability matrix with 38 contract tests (asupersync-2oh2u.4.6)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+    {"id": "H3I-G16", "title": "No unknown stream type handling", "rfc": "9114 §6.2", "severity": "medium", "priority": "P1", "blocking_bead": "T4.5"}
+  ],

+    {"id": "XC-3", "title": "No Huffman decoding prevents aioquic header interop", "affected_peers": ["aioquic"], "severity": "high", "blocked_by": "H3I-G10"},
+    {"id": "XC-4", "title": "Version negotiation fails with v2-preferred peers", "affected_peers": ["ngtcp2"], "severity": "medium", "blocked_by": "QI-G3"},
+    {"id": "XC-5", "title": "ECN asymmetry with s2n-quic", "affected_peers": ["s2n-quic"], "severity": "low", "blocked_by": "QI-G18"},
+    {"id": "XC-6", "title": "BLOCKED frames not sent degrades peer flow control", "affected_peers": ["quinn", "s2n-quic"], "severity": "low", "blocked_by": "QI-G12"},
+    {"id": "XC-7", "title": "Missing address validation tokens block server deployment", "affected_peers": ["quinn", "s2n-quic"], "severity": "high", "blocked_by": "QI-G27"}
+  ],

+    "total_transport_gaps": 28,
+    "total_h3_gaps": 16,
+    "total_gaps": 44,
+    "critical_p0_gaps": 15,
+    "high_p0_p1_gaps": 26,

+    "worst_peer_compat": {"peer": "ngtcp2", "score": 0.37},
+    "primary_blocker": "Loss detection + QPACK dynamic table + Huffman decoding"
+  },
+  "drift_detection": {
+    "rules": [
+      {"id": "DRIFT-Q1", "trigger": "New QUIC RFC published", "action": "Open gap entry + link to RFC"},
+      {"id": "DRIFT-Q2", "trigger": "quinn new release", "action": "Update quinn column"},
+      {"id": "DRIFT-Q3", "trigger": "s2n-quic new release", "action": "Update s2n-quic column"},
+      {"id": "DRIFT-Q4", "trigger": "Asupersync QUIC module change", "action": "Revalidate affected rows"},
+      {"id": "DRIFT-Q5", "trigger": "ngtcp2/nghttp3 release", "action": "Update ngtcp2 column"},
+      {"id": "DRIFT-Q6", "trigger": "JSON hash changes", "action": "Re-run contract tests"}
+    ],
+    "staleness_policy": {
+      "markdown_max_age_days": 14,
+      "json_max_age_days": 14,
+      "test_suite_trigger": "on_gap_closure",
+      "peer_baseline_max_age_days": 30
+    }
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,426 @@
+# QUIC and HTTP/3 Interoperability Matrix
+
+**Bead**: `asupersync-2oh2u.4.6` ([T4.6])
+**Generated by**: SapphireHill (claude-code / opus-4.6)
+**Date**: 2026-03-03
+**Dependencies**: T4.5 (HTTP/3 protocol layer integration)
+**Purpose**: Interoperability matrix against representative external QUIC/H3 peers (quinn, s2n-quic, h3 crate, aioquic, ngtcp2). Captures per-feature parity status, known incompatibilities, reproduction artifacts, and drift detection rules.
+
+---
+
+## 1. Scope
+
+This matrix covers interoperability between the asupersync native QUIC/H3 stack and external QUIC implementations:
+
+| External Peer | Version Baseline | License | Runtime | Role |
+|---|---|---|---|---|
+| quinn | 0.11.x | MIT/Apache-2.0 | Tokio | Primary Rust ecosystem peer |
+| s2n-quic | 1.x | Apache-2.0 | Tokio (optional) | AWS production peer |
+| h3 crate | 0.0.6+ | MIT | Runtime-agnostic | HTTP/3 framing reference |
+| aioquic (Python) | 1.x | BSD-3 | asyncio | Cross-language peer |
+| ngtcp2 (C) | 1.x | MIT | libuv/custom | C reference peer |
+
+### 1.1 Asupersync QUIC/H3 Stack Summary
+
+| Layer | Module | LOC | Status |
+|---|---|---|---|
+| Protocol core (varint, headers, transport params) | `src/net/quic_core/` | ~1,300 | Complete |
+| Native connection machine (handshake, streams, flow control) | `src/net/quic_native/` | ~6,571 | Active |
+| HTTP/3 frame codec + QPACK | `src/http/h3_native.rs` | ~2,723 | Active |
+| HTTP/3 client + body | `src/http/h3/` | ~200 | Active |
+| Quinn compatibility wrapper | `src/net/quic/` | ~500 | Feature-gated (`quic-compat`) |
+| **Total** | | **~11,294** | |
+
+### 1.2 Existing Test Infrastructure
+
+| Test File | Focus | Test Count |
+|---|---|---|
+| `tests/net_quic.rs` | Stream lifecycle, cancellation | ~8 |
+| `tests/quic_h3_e2e.rs` | Deterministic paired client+server | ~10 |
+| `tests/quic_h3_e2e_h3.rs` | HTTP/3 control/request lifecycle | ~17 |
+| `tests/quic_h3_e2e_loss.rs` | Loss detection, ACK handling | ~10 |
+| `tests/quic_h3_e2e_cancel.rs` | Cancellation during handshake/streams | ~8 |
+| `tests/quic_h3_e2e_violations.rs` | Protocol violation scenarios | ~8 |
+
+---
+
+## 2. Transport Layer Interoperability Matrix
+
+### 2.1 QUIC Version and Negotiation
+
+| Capability | RFC | Asupersync | quinn | s2n-quic | ngtcp2 | aioquic | Gap ID |
+|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
+| QUIC v1 (RFC 9000) | 9000 | Partial | Full | Full | Full | Full | QI-G1 |
+| QUIC v2 (RFC 9369) | 9369 | Not implemented | Full | Planned | Full | Not implemented | QI-G2 |
+| Version negotiation | 9000 §6 | Scaffold | Full | Full | Full | Full | QI-G3 |
+| Retry packets | 9000 §17.2.5 | Scaffold | Full | Full | Full | Full | QI-G4 |
+| Stateless reset | 9000 §10.3 | Not implemented | Full | Full | Full | Full | QI-G5 |
+
+### 2.2 Connection Lifecycle
+
+| Capability | RFC | Asupersync | quinn | s2n-quic | ngtcp2 | aioquic | Gap ID |
+|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
+| Initial handshake | 9000 §7 | Complete | Full | Full | Full | Full | — |
+| TLS 1.3 integration | 9001 | Complete (hand-rolled) | Full (rustls) | Full (s2n-tls) | Full (multiple) | Full (built-in) | — |
+| 0-RTT resumption | 9000 §4.6 | Scaffold (T4.4) | Full | Full | Full | Full | QI-G6 |
+| Connection migration | 9000 §9 | Scaffold (state machine) | Full | Full | Full | Full | QI-G7 |
+| Graceful close (GOAWAY) | 9000 §10.2 | Complete | Full | Full | Full | Full | — |
+| Immediate close (CONNECTION_CLOSE) | 9000 §10.2 | Complete | Full | Full | Full | Full | — |
+| Idle timeout | 9000 §10.1 | Complete | Full | Full | Full | Full | — |
+| Draining period | 9000 §10.2.2 | Complete | Full | Full | Full | Full | — |
+| Preferred address | 9000 §9.6 | Not implemented | Partial | Full | Full | Partial | QI-G8 |
+
+### 2.3 Stream Management
+
+| Capability | RFC | Asupersync | quinn | s2n-quic | ngtcp2 | aioquic | Gap ID |
+|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
+| Bidirectional streams | 9000 §2.1 | Complete | Full | Full | Full | Full | — |
+| Unidirectional streams | 9000 §2.1 | Complete | Full | Full | Full | Full | — |
+| Stream ID encoding (type bits) | 9000 §2.1 | Complete | Full | Full | Full | Full | — |
+| MAX_STREAMS enforcement | 9000 §4.6 | Scaffold | Full | Full | Full | Full | QI-G9 |
+| STREAMS_BLOCKED | 9000 §19.14 | Not implemented | Full | Full | Full | Full | QI-G10 |
+| RESET_STREAM | 9000 §19.4 | Complete | Full | Full | Full | Full | — |
+| STOP_SENDING | 9000 §19.5 | Complete | Full | Full | Full | Full | — |
+| Stream prioritization | 9218 | Not implemented | Partial (ext.) | Not implemented | Full | Not implemented | QI-G11 |
+
+### 2.4 Flow Control
+
+| Capability | RFC | Asupersync | quinn | s2n-quic | ngtcp2 | aioquic | Gap ID |
+|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
+| Per-stream flow control | 9000 §4.1 | Complete | Full | Full | Full | Full | — |
+| Connection-level flow control | 9000 §4.1 | Complete | Full | Full | Full | Full | — |
+| MAX_DATA frames | 9000 §19.9 | Complete | Full | Full | Full | Full | — |
+| MAX_STREAM_DATA frames | 9000 §19.10 | Complete | Full | Full | Full | Full | — |
+| DATA_BLOCKED | 9000 §19.12 | Not implemented | Full | Full | Full | Full | QI-G12 |
+| STREAM_DATA_BLOCKED | 9000 §19.13 | Not implemented | Full | Full | Full | Full | QI-G13 |
+| Auto-tuning window | — | Not implemented | Full | Full | Partial | Not implemented | QI-G14 |
+
+### 2.5 Loss Detection and Recovery
+
+| Capability | RFC | Asupersync | quinn | s2n-quic | ngtcp2 | aioquic | Gap ID |
+|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
+| ACK frame processing | 9000 §19.3 | Complete (range merge) | Full | Full | Full | Full | — |
+| ACK delay | 9002 §5.3 | Complete | Full | Full | Full | Full | — |
+| Packet number spaces | 9000 §17.1 | Complete (Initial/HS/App) | Full | Full | Full | Full | — |
+| Time-based loss detection | 9002 §6.1 | Scaffold | Full | Full | Full | Full | QI-G15 |
+| Packet threshold loss | 9002 §6.1 | Scaffold | Full | Full | Full | Full | QI-G16 |
+| PTO (probe timeout) | 9002 §6.2 | Scaffold | Full | Full | Full | Full | QI-G17 |
+| ECN (Explicit Congestion Notification) | 9000 §19.3.2 | Not implemented | Full | Full | Full | Partial | QI-G18 |
+
+### 2.6 Congestion Control
+
+| Capability | RFC | Asupersync | quinn | s2n-quic | ngtcp2 | aioquic | Gap ID |
+|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
+| Congestion window tracking | 9002 §7 | Basic (cwnd field) | Full | Full | Full | Full | QI-G19 |
+| NewReno | 9002 §7 | Not implemented | Full | Configurable | Full | Full | QI-G20 |
+| Cubic | — | Not implemented | Full | Configurable | Full | Not implemented | QI-G21 |
+| BBR / BBRv2 | — | Not implemented | Not implemented | Full (default) | Full (BBRv2) | Not implemented | QI-G22 |
+| Slow start / AIMD | 9002 §7.3-7.4 | Not implemented | Full | Full | Full | Full | QI-G23 |
+| Pacing | — | Not implemented | Full | Full | Full | Not implemented | QI-G24 |
+
+### 2.7 Security
+
+| Capability | RFC | Asupersync | quinn | s2n-quic | ngtcp2 | aioquic | Gap ID |
+|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
+| TLS 1.3 handshake | 9001 | Complete | Full (rustls) | Full (s2n-tls) | Full | Full | — |
+| Key update | 9001 §6 | Scaffold (T4.4) | Full | Full | Full | Full | QI-G25 |
+| Header protection | 9001 §5.4 | Scaffold | Full | Full | Full | Full | QI-G26 |
+| Token validation (NEW_TOKEN) | 9000 §8 | Not implemented | Full | Full | Full | Full | QI-G27 |
+| Address validation | 9000 §8 | Not implemented | Full | Full | Full | Full | QI-G28 |
+
+---
+
+## 3. HTTP/3 Layer Interoperability Matrix
+
+### 3.1 Frame Protocol
+
+| Capability | RFC | Asupersync | h3 crate | quinn-h3 | aioquic | ngtcp2+nghttp3 | Gap ID |
+|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
+| DATA frame | 9114 §7.2.1 | Complete | Full | Full | Full | Full | — |

+## 4. Cross-Implementation Compatibility Issues
+
+### 4.1 Known Incompatibility Classes
+
+| ID | Issue | Affected Peers | Severity | Reproduction | Status |
+|---|---|---|---|---|---|
+| XC-1 | QPACK dynamic table required for efficient header exchange with quinn | quinn, h3 crate | High | Quinn negotiates dynamic table by default; asupersync sends static-only → degraded compression | Blocked on H3I-G4 |
+| XC-2 | Missing GREASE frame handling causes protocol error from ngtcp2+nghttp3 | ngtcp2+nghttp3 | Medium | nghttp3 sends GREASE frames; asupersync lacks unknown-frame skip logic | Blocked on H3I-G3 |
+| XC-3 | No Huffman decoding prevents header interpretation from aioquic | aioquic | High | aioquic encodes headers with Huffman by default; asupersync cannot decode | Blocked on H3I-G10 |
+| XC-4 | Missing version negotiation prevents interop with v2-preferred peers | ngtcp2 | Medium | ngtcp2 may offer QUIC v2 first; asupersync has no VN logic | Blocked on QI-G3 |
+| XC-5 | No ECN support causes congestion control asymmetry with s2n-quic | s2n-quic | Low | s2n-quic uses ECN by default; asupersync ignores ECN markings | Informational |
+| XC-6 | DATA_BLOCKED / STREAM_DATA_BLOCKED not sent degrades peer flow control | quinn, s2n-quic | Low | Peers cannot distinguish stalled sender from lost packets | Informational |
+| XC-7 | Missing address validation token support prevents server deployment | quinn, s2n-quic | High | No NEW_TOKEN generation or validation | Blocked on QI-G27/28 |
+

+

+## 6. Peer-Specific Compatibility Assessment
+
+### 6.1 quinn (Primary Rust Peer)
+
+**Overall compatibility**: Low-Medium (handshake works, streams functional, QPACK/CC/security incomplete)
+
+| Area | Score | Blocking Gaps | Notes |
+|---|---|---|---|
+| Handshake | 4/5 | QI-G3 (version neg.) | Basic handshake succeeds |
+| Stream management | 3/5 | QI-G9, QI-G10 | Bidi/uni streams work; MAX_STREAMS enforcement incomplete |
+| Flow control | 3/5 | QI-G12, QI-G13 | Basic flow control works; BLOCKED frames missing |
+| Loss/recovery | 1/5 | QI-G15–G17 | Scaffold only; unreliable under loss |
+| Congestion control | 0/5 | QI-G19–G24 | No CC algorithm implemented |
+| Security | 2/5 | QI-G25, QI-G26 | TLS handshake works; key update/header protection incomplete |
+| HTTP/3 frames | 4/5 | H3I-G2, H3I-G3 | Core frames work; GREASE/unknown skip missing |
+| QPACK | 1/5 | H3I-G4, H3I-G8, H3I-G10 | Static table only; dynamic table and Huffman missing |
+| **Aggregate** | **18/40 (45%)** | | |
+
+### 6.2 s2n-quic (AWS Production Peer)
+
+**Overall compatibility**: Low (transport-level only, no H3 layer in s2n-quic itself)
+
+| Area | Score | Blocking Gaps | Notes |
+|---|---|---|---|
+| Handshake | 4/5 | QI-G3 | Basic handshake succeeds |
+| Stream management | 3/5 | QI-G9, QI-G10 | Functional streams |
+| Flow control | 3/5 | QI-G12, QI-G13 | Basic works |
+| Loss/recovery | 1/5 | QI-G15–G17 | Scaffold |
+| Congestion control | 0/5 | QI-G19–G24 | No CC algorithm; s2n-quic defaults to BBR |
+| Security | 2/5 | QI-G25–G28 | TLS works; key update, tokens missing |
+| **Aggregate (transport)** | **13/30 (43%)** | | |
+
+### 6.3 ngtcp2 (C Reference)
+
+**Overall compatibility**: Low (QUIC v2 and advanced features create mismatch)
+
+| Area | Score | Blocking Gaps | Notes |
+|---|---|---|---|
+| Handshake | 3/5 | QI-G3, QI-G4 | Retry and VN issues |
+| Stream management | 3/5 | QI-G9, QI-G11 | Priority extension unsupported |
+| Loss/recovery | 1/5 | QI-G15–G17 | Scaffold |
+| Congestion control | 0/5 | QI-G19–G24 | ngtcp2 supports BBRv2 |
+| Security | 2/5 | QI-G25–G28 | Key update incomplete |
+| HTTP/3 (via nghttp3) | 2/5 | H3I-G2, H3I-G3, H3I-G10 | GREASE/Huffman issues |
+| **Aggregate** | **11/30 (37%)** | | |
+

+**Overall compatibility**: Low (Huffman requirement creates hard blocker)
+
+| Area | Score | Blocking Gaps | Notes |

+| Loss/recovery | 1/5 | QI-G15–G17 | Scaffold |
+| HTTP/3 | 1/5 | H3I-G10 | Huffman hard blocker |
+| **Aggregate** | **12/25 (48%)** | | |

+## 7. Drift Detection Rules
+
+### 7.1 Automated Drift Detection
+
+| Rule ID | Trigger | Check | Action |
+|---|---|---|---|
+| DRIFT-Q1 | New QUIC RFC published (IETF tracker) | Check gap register for new requirements | Open gap entry + link to RFC |
+| DRIFT-Q2 | quinn releases new minor/major | Check quinn changelog for new features | Update quinn column in matrix |
+| DRIFT-Q3 | s2n-quic releases new minor/major | Check s2n-quic changelog | Update s2n-quic column |
+| DRIFT-Q4 | Asupersync QUIC module change (any file in `quic_core/`, `quic_native/`, `h3_native.rs`) | Revalidate affected matrix rows | Update status + evidence links |
+| DRIFT-Q5 | ngtcp2/nghttp3 release | Check release notes | Update ngtcp2 column |
+| DRIFT-Q6 | Parity matrix JSON hash changes | Re-run contract tests | Validate consistency |
+
+### 7.2 Staleness Policy
+
+| Artifact | Max Age | Refresh Trigger | Owner |
+|---|---|---|---|
+| This markdown document | 14 days | Any gap closure or new RFC | T4 track owner |
+| Machine-readable JSON | 14 days | Synchronized with markdown | T4 track owner |
+| Contract test suite | On each gap closure | `cargo test --test tokio_quic_h3_interop_matrix` | CI |
+| Peer version baselines | 30 days | Upstream release | T4 track owner |
+
+---
+
+## 8. Interoperability Test Strategy
+
+### 8.1 Deterministic Interop Tests (No External Dependencies)
+
+These tests validate that asupersync's wire format and protocol behavior would be compatible with external peers based on RFC compliance:
+
+1. **Varint encoding round-trip**: Verify RFC 9000 varint encoding matches expected byte patterns
+2. **Transport parameter encoding**: Validate TLV encoding against known-good vectors
+3. **Frame encoding**: Verify H3 frame bytes match RFC 9114 wire format examples
+4. **QPACK static table**: Validate lookup results match RFC 9204 Appendix A
+5. **Pseudo-header validation**: Verify accept/reject decisions per RFC 9114 §4.3
+
+### 8.2 Simulated Interop Tests (Fixture-Based)
+
+Using captured wire traces from external peers:
+
+1. **Quinn handshake fixture**: Decode a captured quinn Initial packet
+2. **QPACK encoded headers fixture**: Decode headers encoded by h3 crate with Huffman+dynamic
+3. **GOAWAY fixture**: Process GOAWAY from ngtcp2+nghttp3
+4. **SETTINGS exchange fixture**: Verify settings round-trip with aioquic
+
+### 8.3 Live Interop Tests (Requires External Dependencies)
+
+These require the `quic-interop` feature flag and network access:
+
+1. **Quinn bidirectional**: Connect asupersync client ↔ quinn server (or reverse)
+2. **s2n-quic handshake**: Basic handshake + stream exchange
+3. **ngtcp2 cross-language**: Connect to ngtcp2 server, exchange H3 request
+
+**Note**: Live tests are not part of CI; they require explicit opt-in and external processes.
+

+
+### 9.1 Path to Interop Readiness
+
+**Wave 1 (Critical)**: Close QI-G15–G20, QI-G23, QI-G25–G26, H3I-G3–G4, H3I-G8, H3I-G10
+- Enables: Basic reliable delivery, conformant wire format, header interop
+- Expected peer compatibility after: ~65-75%
+
+**Wave 2 (High)**: Close QI-G3–G7, QI-G9, QI-G14, QI-G21, QI-G24, QI-G27–G28, H3I-G1–G2, H3I-G5–G7, H3I-G9, H3I-G11
+- Enables: Production-grade deployment, all common peer scenarios
+- Expected peer compatibility after: ~85-90%
+
+**Wave 3 (Polish)**: Close remaining P2 gaps
+- Enables: Feature-complete parity with mature peers
+- Expected peer compatibility after: ~95%+
